# PreviewSession.Event

**Enumeration**

An event from the preview session’s events stream.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Event
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **PreviewSession.Event.didClose**: The session did close.
- **PreviewSession.Event.didFail(_:)**: The session failed to open with an error.
- **PreviewSession.Event.didOpen**: The session did successfully open.

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype

items.description: The session failed to open with an error.
items.name: PreviewSession.Event.didFail(_:)
